stemHtml: Due to an aircraft upset, the pilot's instrument scan is disrupted. When they next look at the instruments, they see that the airspeed needle has moved from within the range of the yellow arc to beyond that indicated by a red line. These speed markings represent…

options.a: The caution range and the normal operating speed limit.
options.b: The normal speed range and the flaps extended speed.
options.c: The normal speed range and the never exceed speed.
options.d: The caution range and the never exceed speed.
